raw_text: Fraudster I cancelled my order because your support assured me that the promo code would be refunded and could be used on my next order. When I tried to use it after 30 days, I was informed that it had expired and was valid only for 30 days. This condition was never disclosed at the time of cancellation. Instead of refunding my money, you replaced it with a time-limited promo code, causing me financial loss. This is an unfair and misleading trade practice.

Not a good experience. The milk products and curd I ordered were not of good quality, and this has happened repeatedly. It is better to buy these items from a nearby local shop. It seems the required storage temperature is not being maintained during handling or delivery, which is affecting the quality and freshness of the products.

The location pinning feature in this app is completely useless. When I try to pin my exact home address, it automatically pins to a completely different, wrong location. Because of this poor map accuracy, delivery partners are always confused, and deliveries are getting delayed. Your address location pinning system is a complete waste of time. Please fix this map issue immediately.

The app is may be useful for everyone. I ordered a few things last week. But the order was cancelled. But I have not received the refund. A week passed the date they said First it was 14 then it was 17 and now it is 18. Today is the date 19/6/26.Still I didn't receive any refund.I made the payment on 9th June. it's very disappointing. 🥴

0 stars! Worst app. You pay for convenience but get inconvenience instead. Chat support suddenly stopped working for my account, and email complaints only receive generic replies. Every order feels like a gamble because I can't report damaged or missing items through the app. My last order, a single chocolate, was promised in 12 mins but took 45, and my 10 calls were not put through to delivery executive. Deleted my account today and uninstalling the app. No help from customer support at all!!

No one should order icecreams from blinkit, especially the ones that are not in tubs or family packs. Not once, but this has happened multiple times that our icecreams have arrived absolutely melted and broken. We dont know for what the app applies 'handling charges' when they don't provide the goods in a fine condition. Also, we recently ordered 5 packets of milk, which all were expired.

Only good for small groceries. I bought a power bank from blinkit in the app it said 7 days exchange for it. I received a torn apart package from blinkit and also the product was not up to mark. I tried to apply for replacement and they said we occasionally send torn apart packages while in transit and if you have any problem with the device then go talk to that company and get documented proof from them that the product is fake only then we will think about replacement otherwise use it as such.

I placed a prepaid order on Blinkit, but it was never delivered. The app incorrectly marked it as "Delivered." Customer support informed me that the order was returned to the store, yet I have not received any refund. Additionally, I am unable to raise a complaint through the app as it repeatedly shows, "We have massive inquiries and are not able to respond. Please try after some time." I recommend not to use this app..

Third class app whenever the order fails their refund process takes a hell lot of time I have also used Instamart and over there if there is a failed order within minutes we get our money back .. All apps of zomato are like this they just don't want to refund the money, you need to raise multiple complaints , raise multiple chats and then only if you are lucky so you will get your money back after a week maybe. Use zepto Instamart or any other app but not this who thinks ours money is there.

This is very good because the goods arrive immediately in times of emergency🙏🥰 but one I face a problem, whenever I search for anything, the picture of the product does not show until I click on it completely and open it.

Ordered a few gifts through Blinkit and it was a terrible experience. The items arrived in heavily damaged packaging, the gift wrap design delivered was completely different from what was shown in the app, and even the boxes were plain instead of the branded packaging advertised. Customer support was unhelpful, refused to acknowledge the issues, and ended the chat without resolving anything. If your order is meant for someone special, don't expect Blinkit to care about quality

The product was good but delivery service was too bad instead it's my first order my first experience is worst from your side . I have placed correct location only but he said wrong location and take extra amount without informing me . He said I not have balance then I pay remaining amount through GPay then he pay 10 rs low i ask he not properly answered then go this kind of problem need to reduce so add select on map like red taxi car having options.

I have used blinkit 2-3 times it worked good but as soon as I continued this app and ordered groceries and fish, they placed order for groceries but automatically removed fish while billing and by mistake I have done the payment, it charged 52 rupees extra which was not fair at all. this kind of app just makes fool to the people.

it is very helpful and but I'm giving them 4 star because some they delay the items so late and some times they increase the price of an item up to 50% for example recently I have ordered toothpaste their the price is shown 99 rupees but they increase it 50% and the price raised up to 180

My experience with Blinkit was extremely disappointing. I received the wrong product, and what made the situation even worse was the poor customer support. Despite reporting the issue immediately, there was no effective resolution or accountability. The customer service team was unresponsive, unhelpful, and failed to provide a satisfactory solution. For a platform that promises convenience and reliability, this level of service is unacceptable. Receiving the wrong product is frustrating.

Do Not Buy! Fraudulent App and Terrible Service This is the worst shopping app ever. I ordered an exhaust fan, and it arrived damaged and defective (running extremely slow). When I raised a return request, customer service flatly refused it. They falsely claimed that I "used" the product, when in reality, I only switched it on once to check if it was working. The physical damage was already there when it arrived. There is absolutely no return support for defective items. Save your money

I've ordered day before yesterday which was two products I've paid the order so only order was been placed but when delivery came the delivery guy asked to pay but I've said I've paid but that time my account balance was not updated so I've paid him cash thing is here after I get know that my money was actually debited and I've paid extra money also so I've raised complaint and I've emailed them but still my issue isn't been solved and didn't did any justice to me.WORST CUSTOMER EXPERIENCE!!!

Very bad experience they charge 20 rs for cancellation fee. They don't provide an option for cancellation we need to contact customer care for it and they say we requested for cancellation lately🤦. And I immediately requested it post my order.

very bad experience i have ordered the product from it and it's used and the quality is very bad i have raised the issue to customer care but there also i got bot support which was awful even after that i mailed blinkit support regarding this there also they said sorry we can't help you with this , don't order from blinkit you'll get scammed order from other delivery apps

Hi, I received the blanket in unacceptable condition. The product was not seal-packed, and it appears to have been used before. There is also a black dirty stain/substance on the product, making it unhygienic and not fit to use. I am very disappointed with the condition of the product. please don't use this aap fir buying products. I have sent an email to Blanket regarding the condition with pictures of the product.
